---
title: "Add p-values onto barplot or boxplot"
date: 2023-03-29
categories:
- R
- ggplot2
- p-value
image: plot.png
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    # fig.width = 6,
    # fig.height = 3.8,
    fig.align = "center",
    fig.retina = 3,
    out.width = "85%",
    collapse = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)      # creat easily publication plots
library(rstatix)     # pipe-friendly tools for easy statistical analyses
 ```


```{r}

df <- ToothGrowth

df$dose <- as.factor(df$dose)

### comparing two means using t_test() (parametric) or wicox_text() 
```

### Reference
